name: spoons-classroom-game
description: Spoons - online multiplayer classroom card game starter using Phaser, Vite, TypeScript, Colyseus and Node.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c auto "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.server:start: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace server run start
scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.zip:client: npm run client:build && cd client/dist && zip -r ../../spoons-itch-client.zip .
